title: Local government reorganisation: letter to areas invited to submit final proposals
body: "On 23 July 2025, the Minister of State for Local Government and English Devolution wrote to all councils invited to submit proposals for local government reorganisation, reaffirming the government’s commitment to delivering a single tier of local government.  The letter included the document “Summary of the local government reorganisation process”, which provides further information on the reorganisation process and expected timelines. The letter also shared an explanatory note titled “Financial decisions before local government reorganisation”.  Additionally, councils had previously been asked through feedback on their interim plans to consider options for joint working for the delivery of social care. This letter provided further details on this by enclosing the document “Local government reorganisation: Considerations for partnership working in social care for new unitary authorities”, which outlines key considerations to support the development of partnership working options. "
